fault_hypothesis: Line 70 computes the new expiration timestamp but never writes it back into the store. The store entry is never updated, so sliding-window behaviour is broken.

spec.expr: store.get(key) is not None and store[key][1] == now + ttl__1

constraints.intent: After computing the new expiration, the store must already reflect the updated expires_at value.
The newly computed expires_at must be persisted back into the store immediately after it is computed.
Before returning the value, the store entry's expiration must have been updated to now+ttl.

spec.expr: __cbfl_result is None or (key in store and abs(store[key][1] - (now + ttl)) < 1e-9)

constraints.intent: When a valid value is returned, the store must have the updated expiration timestamp.
